Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost/api/v1/auth/login \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -H "Origin: http://localhost:3000" \\
  -d '{"email":"test@example.com","password":"Test1234"}' | python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
if d.get\('success'\):
    data = d.get\('data', {}\)
    print\('LOGIN OK'\)
    print\('  access_token:', data.get\('access_token',''\)[:30] + '...'\)
    print\('  refresh_token present:', bool\(data.get\('refresh_token'\)\)\)
    print\('  CORS credentials header will allow browser to read response'\)
else:
    print\('FAILED:', d.get\('message'\)\)
")

Bash(echo "=== Wrong password \(should show error, NOT reload\) ===" && \\
curl -s -X POST http://localhost/api/v1/auth/login \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -H "Origin: http://localhost:3000" \\
  -d '{"email":"test@example.com","password":"WrongPass1"}' | python3 -c "
import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\('Status:', 'error' if not d['success'] else 'ok'\)
print\('Message:', d.get\('message'\)\)
"

echo "" && echo "=== Correct password \(should return tokens\) ===" && \\
curl -s -X POST http://localhost/api/v1/auth/login \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -H "Origin: http://localhost:3000" \\
  -d '{"email":"test@example.com","password":"Test1234"}' | python3 -c "
import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\('Success:', d['success']\)
print\('access_token present:', bool\(d.get\('data',{}\).get\('access_token'\)\)\)
print\('refresh_token present:', bool\(d.get\('data',{}\).get\('refresh_token'\)\)\)
")

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
import urllib.request, json
BASE = 'http://localhost:3001/api/v1'
r = urllib.request.Request\(BASE+'/auth/login', data=json.dumps\({'email':'freelancer_test@dopawork.com','password':'Test@12345'}\).encode\(\), headers={'Content-Type':'application/json'}, method='POST'\)
try:
    res = urllib.request.urlopen\(r\)
    print\(json.dumps\(json.loads\(res.read\(\)\), indent=2\)\)
except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
    print\(e.code, json.loads\(e.read\(\)\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
import urllib.request, json
BASE = 'http://localhost:3001/api/v1'
r = urllib.request.Request\(BASE+'/auth/login', data=json.dumps\({'email':'client_test@dopawork.com','password':'Test@12345'}\).encode\(\), headers={'Content-Type':'application/json'}, method='POST'\)
try:
    res = urllib.request.urlopen\(r\)
    print\(res.status, res.headers.get\('Content-Type',''\)\)
except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
    print\(e.code, json.loads\(e.read\(\)\)\)
" 2>&1)
